name: Gruntwork
description: Gruntwork — Infrastructure-as-code library company providing battle-tested Terraform modules and DevOps tooling.

seo.title: Gruntwork — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Gruntwork: Gruntwork — Infrastructure-as-code library company providing battle-tested Terraform modules and DevOps tooling.

when_to_use: Compliance-ready modules for SOC2 and HIPAA environments

pros: Battle-tested Terraform modules for AWS reference architectures
Saves months of infra design work
Terragrunt and tooling fill real Terraform gaps
cons: Modules can feel over-engineered for small shops
Lock-in to Gruntwork opinions and layout
review.verdict: The shortcut to a production-grade AWS landing zone — expensive but cheaper than rolling your own.
review.best_for: Series A and up teams standing up serious AWS infra and can afford enterprise tooling.
review.not_for: Early-stage projects, hobby infra, or teams already deep in CDK/Pulumi.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
